title: Continue after rejecting the invoice cache hypothesis

events.text: Fix stale invoice totals without changing the public API; currency values must remain decimal strings.
The first hypothesis is a stale total cache in InvoiceService.
Disabling the cache does not change the failing total test.
The parser drops negative adjustment rows before aggregation.
src/invoice/parser.ts now retains negative adjustments; the focused regression test is not written yet.
Do not retry the cache path; prove the parser fix with a regression test next.

criticalConstraints.text: Keep currency values as decimal strings.

objectiveAndState.text: Fix stale invoice totals; the parser change is present but unverified.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: The cache hypothesis was rejected because disabling it did not fix the test.
Negative adjustment rows are the identified cause.

completedAndPending.text: Parser retention is implemented; the focused regression test remains pending.

nextAction.text: Write and run the focused negative-adjustment regression test.
